recommendations.title: Mafia: Survival Game
recommendations.overview: A twist on the classic game of Mafia. 12 competitors take part in a game of life and death where the innocent must take out the Mafia in order to win the cash prize. Those that are voted out must face their biggest fears in a computer simulation.

recommendations.title: The Bunker Game
recommendations.overview: Laura, 25, is an actress in a L.A.R.P. (Live Action Role Playing) Game, where the participants play the survivors of an atomic war who live underground in a sealed bunker. After several mysterious accidents, the game is interrupted and the players le

recommendations.title: We're All Going to the World's Fair
recommendations.overview: Reality and fantasy begin to blur when a teenager, alone in her attic bedroom, immerses herself in a role-playing horror game online.

recommendations.title: Keep Watching
recommendations.overview: A family imprisoned by intruders is forced to play a terrifying game of "Kill, Or Be Killed". As the night unfolds, the game's mysterious rules become clear, and the family realizes their nightmare is being streamed live to riveted viewers all over t

recommendations.title: Brainscan
recommendations.overview: A lonely teenage horror-movie fan discovers a mysterious computer game that uses hypnosis to custom-tailor the game into the most terrifying experience imaginable. When he emerges from the hypnotic trance he is horrified to find evidence that the bru

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In 2026, a new machine called the Augma is developed to compete against the NerveGear and its successor, the Amusphere. A next-gen wearable device, the Augma doesn't have a full-dive function like its predecessors. Instead, it uses Augmented Reality

recommendations.title: eXistenZ
recommendations.overview: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.

recommendations.title: Saw
recommendations.overview: David, an orderly at a hospital, tells his horrific story of being kidnapped and forced to play a vile game of survival.

recommendations.title: The Wife
recommendations.overview: A wife questions her life choices as she travels to Stockholm with her husband, where he is slated to receive the Nobel Prize for Literature.

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.
